chunks.doc_name: Medical Device Design Controls - Free Webinar Series
chunks.text: Solutions built for medical device teams to move faster, stay compliant, and grow with confidence. ![product-nav_quality-management-icon](https://www.greenlight.guru/hubfs/product-nav_quality-management-icon.svg) Manage quality events, training, and documentation in one place. Control documents, training, and change with traceability. Track CAPAs, audits, and NCs with audit-ready records. Qualify suppliers and manage parts with visibility. ![product-nav_product-development-icon](https://www.greenlight.guru/hubfs/product-nav_product-development-icon.svg) Connect design, risk, and AI-powered traceability as you build. Link needs, requirements, and verification to design controls. Automate traceability from dev tools for faster releases. Assess ISO 14971 risk as requirements and tests evolve. ![product-nav_clinical-evidence-icon](https://www.greenlight.guru/hubfs/product-nav_clinical-evidence-icon.svg) Oversee studies with connected data, documents, and workflows. Capture compliant clinical data with a validated medical EDC. Plan and manage PMCF aligned to EU MDR expectations. Collect clinical outcome data in-person or remotely on any device. ![lightbulb-icon](https://www.greenlight.guru/hubfs/lightbulb-icon.svg) Built with regulatory insight to help medtech teams move faster with confidence. ![ai-icon](https://www.greenlight.guru/hubfs/ai-icon.svg) Find issues faster and make smarter decisions with less manual work. ![education-icon](https://www.greenlight.guru/hubfs/education-icon.svg) Tools and resources that help teams implement quickly and meet requirements. ![Asset 22@3x 1]() #### QMSR is coming. Is your quality system ready? This page is your one-stop resource for understanding what’s changing, what’s at stake, and how to stay compliant. ![Contact Sales](https://no-cache.hubspot.com/cta/default/495719/c0ac4c7c-1ce5-4f7f-9917-7641babf6ba1.png) ![Get a Demo](https://no-cache.hubspot.com/cta/default/495719/df8edfba-9502-444a-8575-76dad17db2c7.png) ![Contact Sales](https://no-cache.hubspot.com/cta/default/495719/c0ac4c7c-1ce5-4f7f-9917-7641babf6ba1.png) ![Get a Demo](https://no-cache.hubspot.com/cta/default/495719/df8edfba-9502-444a-8575-76dad17db2c7.png) ![greenlight_guru](https://www.greenlight.guru/hubfs/Resources/gg_logos/SVG/nav_green-lockup_Registered%20(1).svg) **FREE ON-DEMAND WEBINAR** # The Complete Guide to FDA Design Controls #### Free, On-Demand Two-Part Webinar Series (90 Minutes Each) FDA [Design Control](/blog/design-controls) regulations defined in 21 CFR 820.30 have been in place for 20 years now, **yet year after year they continue to be one of the top issues cited during inspections**. This *does not*, and *should not*, be the case for your medical device company. Join us for this free, two-part webinar series presented by two of the world's leading experts on the topic to learn how to implement a design control process that will not only **ensure compliance** but will actually **benefit your product development efforts**. ###### In Part 1, you'll learn about Intended Use, User Needs, Design Inputs, Design Reviews, Design History File (DHF) and Risk Management. ## Watch the webinar ##### Specifically: ###### In Part 2, you'll learn about Design Outputs, Device Master Record (DMR), Design Verification and Validation (V&V), Design Transfer and Regulatory Submissions. ##### Specifically: ## Hosted by ### ###### david_amor_round ![david_amor_round](https://www.greenlight.guru/hs-fs/hubfs/Resources/david_amor_round.png?width=300&name=david_amor_round.png) ###### Presenter: David Amor Founder & CEO, *Medgineering & QuickConsult* ### ###### jon-speer-80px-circle-1 ![jon-speer-80px-circle-1](https://www.greenlight.guru/hs-fs/hubfs/blog-files/jon-speer-80px-circle-1.png?width=300&name=jon-speer-80px-circle-1.png) ###### Moderator: Jon Speer Founder & VP QA/RA, *Greenlight Guru* ### ![medgineering_logo](https://www.greenlight.guru/hs-fs/hubfs/Resources/partner_logos/medgineering_logo.png?width=124&name=medgineering_logo.png) ![medgineering_logo](https://www.greenlight.guru/hs-fs/hubfs/Resources/partner_logos/medgineering_logo.png?width=124&name=medgineering_logo.png) ###### About Medgineering Gone are the days of hiring high-priced consultants to develop, execute and guide quality and compliance work. Medgineering offers flexible, customizable solutions to your consulting needs – and at a fraction of the cost of traditional consulting firms. ### ![greenlight-guru-logo](https://www.greenlight.guru/hs-fs/hubfs/images/greenlight-guru/greenlight-guru-logo.png?width=200&name=greenlight-guru-logo.png) ![greenlight-guru-logo](https://www.greenlight.guru/hs-fs/hubfs/images/greenlight-guru/greenlight-guru-logo.png?width=200&name=greenlight-guru-logo.png) ###### About Greenlight Guru Greenlight Guru is the only Medical Device Success Platform (MDSP) for companies to bring new products to market faster while simplifying regulatory compliance and reducing risk. Being the only industry specific, cloud-based software, Greenlight Guru is easier to implement, easier to use and designed to fit all medical device needs to enable innovative, safe and effective, True Quality medical devices. Visit our homepage to [learn more](/). ## Featured In ![](https://www.greenlight.guru/hs-fs/hubfs/forbes.png?format=webp&width=439&height=115&name=forbes.png) ![](https://www.greenlight.guru/hs-fs/hubfs/mddi_logo_sq-1.webp?format=webp&width=240&height=160&name=mddi_logo_sq-1.webp)
